data.content: Implemented includeAncestorsOfActiveBeats helper in knots-backend.ts, beads-backend.ts, and bd.ts. When in_action filter is used, each active beat's parent chain is walked upward and missing ancestors are appended to results. Descendant expansion is untouched. Updated existing regression tests in knots-backend.test.ts and beads-backend-coverage.test.ts to expect the queued parent in active view. All 2238 tests pass. Branch: feat/active-ancestor-inclusion
